leadText: Milcery (Japanese: マホミル Mahomil) is a Fairy-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VIII. It evolves into Alcremie while holding a Sweet when the player spins and strikes a pose or gets dizzy. The form it evolves into depends on the time of day, the length of the spin, and whether the Trainer was spinning clockwise or counterclockwise. Its appearance is further determined by the type of Sweet that is held. Milcery evolves into: Vanilla Cream Alcremie after spinning clockwise for less than 5 seconds during the day. Ruby Cream Alcremie after spinning counterclockwise for less than 5 seconds during the day. Matcha Cream Alcremie after spinning clockwise for less than 5 seconds at night. Mint Cream Alcremie after spinning counterclockwise for more than 5 seconds at night. Lemon Cream Alcremie after spinning clockwise for more than 5 seconds at night. Salted Cream Alcremie after spinning counterclockwise for less than 5 seconds at night. Ruby Swirl Alcremie after spinning counterclockwise for more than 5 seconds during the day. Caramel Swirl Alcremie after spinning clockwise for more than 5 seconds during the day. Rainbow Swirl Alcremie after spinning in either direction for more than 10 seconds during the evening. (Refer to Game data→Evolution data for more details.)

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Milcery is a small cream-colored Pokémon that resembles a splash of milk. It has a droplet-shaped body composed of cream, with two arms and a crown of six protrusions. These protrusions are made out of that same cream with droplets constantly jumping from them. It has completely white eyes. Milcery is born from sweet-smelling particles in the air. When a Milcery absorbs sweet aromas, its body begins to swell. Milcery will start to deflate when its energy level begins to drop. When Milcery is attacked, it will tackle the foe first before covering them in cream. Once the opponent is either blinded or astonished by delicious cream, Milcery will then flee. It is rumored that patisseries visited by Milcery are guaranteed success and good fortune. It is a female-only species. Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Milcery evolves into one of nine forms of Alcremie . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Milcery Fairy → First Evolution Alcremie Fairy Alcremie's flavor and color are wildly variable and dependent on the time of day, slight vibrations, direction, and duration for which it was swirled while it was a Milcery. Vanilla Cream Ruby Cream Matcha Cream Mint Cream Lemon Cream Salted Cream Ruby Swirl Caramel Swirl Rainbow Swirl Each form has seven further minor forms. For more details on Alcremie's appearance, see its forms section

PP Baby-Doll Eyes Fairy Status — 100% 30 Last Resort Normal Physical 140 100% 5 Moves marked with an asterisk (*) must be chain bred onto Milcery Bold indicates a move that gets STAB when used by Milcery Italic indicates a move that gets STAB only when used by an Evolution of Milcery Side game data [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon GO File:GO0868.png Base HP: 128 Base Attack: 90 Base Defense: 97 Egg Distance: N/A Buddy Distance: 3 km Evolution Requirement: 50 Fast Attacks: Charm , Tackle Charged Attacks: Dazzling Gleam Evolution data [ edit | edit source ] Milcery evolves into Alcremie while holding a Sweet when the player spins and strikes a pose (in Pokémon Sword and Shield ) or gets dizzy (in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet ). The form it evolves into depends on the time of day, the length of the spin, and whether the Trainer was spinning clockwise or counterclockwise. Its appearance is further determined by the type of Sweet that is held. Milcery evolves into: Vanilla Cream Alcremie after spinning clockwise for less than 5 seconds during the day. Ruby Cream Alcremie after spinning counterclockwise for less than 5 seconds during the day. Matcha Cream Alcremie after spinning clockwise for less than 5 seconds at night. Mint Cream Alcremie after spinning counterclockwise for more than 5 seconds at night. Lemon Cream Alcremie after spinning clockwise for more than 5 seconds at night. Salted Cream Alcremie after spinning counterclockwise for less than 5 seconds at night. Ruby Swirl Alcremie after spinning counterclockwise for more than 5 seconds during the day. Caramel Swirl Alcremie after spinning clockwise for more than 5 seconds during the day. Rainbow Swirl Alcremie after spinning in either direction for more than 10 seconds during the evening (between 7:00 and 7:59PM in real time in Pokémon Sword and Shield ). Unevolved Milcery Fairy Spin holding a Sweet → First Evolution Alcremie Fairy Vanilla Cream Ruby Cream Matcha Cream Mint Cream Lemon Cream Salted Cream Ruby Swirl Caramel Swirl Rainbow Swirl Spin clockwise for less than 5 seconds during the day . Spin counterclockwise for less than 5 seconds during the day . Spin clockwise for less than 5 seconds at night . Spin counterclockwise for more than 5 seconds at night . Spin clockwise for more than 5 seconds at night . Spin counterclockwise for less than 5 seconds at night . Spin counterclockwise for more than 5 seconds during the day . Spin clockwise for more than 5 seconds during the day . Spin in either direction for more than 10 seconds during the evening . Each form has seven further minor forms based on the Sweet used to evolve it. For more details on Alcremie's appearance, see its forms section Sprites [ edit | edit source ] This Pokémon was unavailable prior to Generation VIII. sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry JN082 Milcery Goh's Rotom Phone Milcery, the Cream Pokémon. A Fairy type. Milcery's body is made of cream, cream that forms when sweet-smelling particles travel on the wind and gather together.
